title: Gray's Mob Overhaul
body:
is a RPG inspired Mob overhaul pack that aims to redesign all the natural mobs in Minecraft with custom models and tons of variant textures!

Works best for Versions 1.19 -1.20
OptiFine OR ETF/EMF mods Required

Use mods? Check out the villager mod support add-on here!

Mob Previews:

Extra Releases Available on my Patreon!

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Gray's Mob Overhaul should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
